title: ReSiever
description: Provides compat between NotEnoughItems Unofficial and Ex-Nihilo / Thermal Expansion
body:
Due to the way NEI Unofficial changed the recipe GUI, mods that make assumptions about its location or the number of recipes per page don't work properly anymore. This mod uses mixins to fix these NEI handlers.

Currently supported: - [Thermal Expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-expansion) - [Ex Nihilo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ex-nihilo) **This mod requires [NotEnoughItems Unofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughitems-unofficial) and [Sponge Mixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/spongemixin1710)**
